creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Details!👇🏼

1. Bean Point – Anna Maria Island  🛣️ ~45 minutes from St. Pete Beach ☀️ Peaceful, undeveloped, and Instagram-worthy sunsets—locals love it and wish I’d gatekeep it

2. Boca Grande – Gasparilla Island  🛣️ ~1 hr 45 min from St. Pete Beach 🌴 Historic charm, white sands, and those old Florida vibes you just can’t fake.

3. Honeymoon Island State Park
 🛣️ ~40 minutes from St. Pete Beach
 🌊 Great for shelling, birdwatching, and taking in those classic Gulf coast views without the crowds.

4. Fort De Soto Park
 🛣️ ~20 minutes from St. Pete Beach
 🐚 Named one of the best beaches in the country—tons of space, dog beach, kayaking, forts, and more.

5. Whitney Beach – Longboat Key  🛣️ ~1 hr 30 min from St. Pete Beach
 🌺 Quiet, upscale, and right across the street from great food at Whitney’s—yes, it’s worth the drive.

Why these over St. Pete? ✅ Fewer crowds ✅ More local charm ✅ Unspoiled nature ✅ Better photo ops (and no one’s photobombing your pics)

💬 Tell me which one you’d visit first!
 📌 Save this for your next beach day!
 📤 Send this to your beach buddy!
 🌴 Follow @thefloridaqueenie for more Florida gems!

transcription.text: And everything that kills me Makes me feel alive
